publishedAbstract: * How to migrate ODF storage components (OSDs and Monitors) from one StorageClass to another? * Infrastructure changes (such as moving from one VMware vSphere datastore to another or switching disk types) require ODF to reside on a new StorageClass. * Need a procedure to migrate OSDs and Monitors ensuring zero downtime and data integrity during the transition.
publishedTitle: Migrate Red Hat OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) OSDs and Monitors between different StorageClasses or VMware vSphere datastores
